short_description: Download & Save Pornlib Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Pornlib Downloader is a browser extension built for the PornLib library/catalog platform, designed to help you save videos from branded /video pages. Instead of digging through page source or network tools, this extension follows the embedded player handoff that PornLib uses and surfaces the available media stream for download.

faqs.question: Does this extension work on every PornLib video page?
faqs.answer: It is designed for PornLib /video pages that use the descriptive slug plus numeric tail URL pattern and iframe-based playback handoff.

faqs.question: Can I download videos in the highest quality available?
faqs.answer: The extension detects the streams surfaced after the iframe handoff, which typically includes multiple quality options when available.

faqs.question: Is my download history tracked or stored anywhere?
faqs.answer: No. The extension processes everything locally in your browser and does not send your download activity to any external server.

faqs.question: What happens if the stream format changes in the future?
faqs.answer: The extension targets m3u8 and mp4 formats commonly found on PornLib. If the platform changes its delivery method, an update may be needed.

faqs.question: Do I need an account to use the trial?
faqs.answer: You need to sign in with your email using a one-time password to activate the 3 free downloads, but no credit card is required.

why: PornLib organizes its video content under a library-style catalog system with branded /video pages. Unlike typical tube sites where the media source is directly embedded, PornLib often hands off playback through an iframe layer before the actual stream becomes available. This extra step makes it harder for standard downloader tools to find and capture the video file.

Pornlib Downloader is purpose-built for this setup. It recognizes the PornLib page structure, follows the iframe handoff, and surfaces the m3u8 or mp4 stream so you can save the video in a single click. The extension stays focused on PornLib's specific architecture instead of using generic detection logic that may miss the embedded player layer.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open PornLib and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Navigate to a PornLib video page with a URL like /video/descriptive-slug-123456.
Allow the page to load completely, including the embedded player iframe.
Click the Pornlib Downloader icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
Wait while the extension scans the page and follows the iframe handoff.
Review the detected stream options displayed in the popup.
Select your preferred quality or format from the available choices.
Click the download button to start saving the video.
Save the completed MP4 file to your preferred location.

troubleshooting: The extension does not detect any video on the page Make sure the video player has started playing. PornLib often requires user interaction before the iframe handoff completes.
The download button is grayed out or unresponsive Refresh the page and try again. If the issue persists, check that you are on a supported PornLib /video page with the correct URL format.
The popup shows no stream options The embedded player may not have fully loaded. Wait for the video to begin playing, then open the popup again.
The download fails partway through Check your internet connection and try again. Some streams may be temporarily unavailable from the source.
I see an error about unsupported browser Make sure you are using a compatible browser version. Check the latest release notes for supported browser information.
